goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'arrive by 18:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'price', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on monday and should arrive by 18:45
Make sure you get travel time, price, and train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the west
Make sure you get whether they have internet and postcode
